calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert M. Sellards, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Santiago Aceves, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Luis Martinez.
Default entered against defendant on July 3, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 15, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Handwritten Rental Agreement dated 07/01/06-----------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Santiago Aceves, and against the Defaulted Defendant Luis Martinez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,661.64.
Prejudgment Interest - 3,526.97.
Costs $400.00, for a total of $39,588.61.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
